expectations.text: Response references the workflow selection table (R->P->I->V for unfamiliar, P->I->V for known, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 reproduces the full workflow selection table with all 4 scenarios and selects 'Full R -> P -> I -> V'.

expectations.text: Each recommended phase includes its output artifact path (e.g., .prism/shared/research/YYYY-MM-DD-topic.md)
Debug and Validate phases are mentioned as part of the full workflow
expectations.evidence: Phase 4 covers Validate in detail. Step 4 mentions '/prism-debug': 'If quality gates fail during implementation, this spawns investigation agents to diagnose issues.'

expectations.text: Context management thresholds are referenced if session is long
expectations.evidence: No mention of context management thresholds anywhere in the transcript.
